field_values.action_summary: The violent shaking subsides into a rhythmic swaying. Exhausted and overwhelmed, Dorothy and Toto fall asleep as the house continues its long, silent journey through the sky.
field_values.camera_intent: Slow, sweeping pans; Soft, rhythmic lighting simulating passing clouds; Close-ups on sleeping subjects
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Rhythmic sway frequency of the farmhouse
Light patterns moving across floor surfaces in sync with cloud layers
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC004

## Production Intent
Transition the visual energy from violent kinetic chaos to a rhythmic, suspended state of eerie calm. Use light movement and house sway to establish the new status quo of high-altitude drifting.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (weary traveler, white clothing)
- toto

## Required Environments
- farmhouse_interior_and_cellar
- cyclone_storm_void (external context)

## Continuity Constraints
- The "sway" rhythm must remain consistent in frequency.
- Light patterns moving across the floor must simulate passing cloud layers.

## Beat List
- BT001: Kinetic decay (shaking to swaying)
- BT002: Atmospheric drift (light movement/cloud shadows)
- BT003: Suspended calm (subjects asleep in rhythmic motion)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
